hero.h1Part1: A bot and a mobile app replace
hero.subtitle: OpenSales is a single platform for distributors and shop owners. Orders come in through both a Telegram bot and a mobile app — even if Telegram goes down completely, sales keep running through the app without interruption. Management through a web panel, real-time reports, debt control and delivery route management — all in one system.

pageWelcome.audiencesSubtitle: OpenSales makes the job easier for every participant in the sales chain.

distributors.title: Distributors
distributors.text: An automated system that replaces sales agents. The workflow is streamlined, ensuring speed and transparency.

shopOwners.title: Shop owners
shopOwners.text: Place orders at any time of day, track your debt in real time and stay informed about new prices on time.

deliverymen.title: Couriers
deliverymen.text: The daily route appears on the phone screen: address, order amount and payment terms are shown in advance.

pageWelcome.featuresSubtitle: A ready-made toolkit for every stage of distribution.

bot.title: Your organization's own bot
bot.text: A separate Telegram bot is launched for each distributor. The brand name, logo and description keep your organization's distinct look.

miniApp.title: Mobile app (Android & iOS)
miniApp.text: The shop owner can also open the catalog through the mobile app. The bot and app share one account — orders, debt and payments in one place. Even if Telegram stops working, orders keep coming in through the app.

cart.title: Cart and order placement
cart.text: A single order can contain several products. The cart is kept for 24 hours and turns into an official order with one confirmation.

catalog.title: Catalog management
catalog.text: Categories, product types, multiple images, prices, stock levels and active status are all managed in one place. Bulk upload is available.

routes.title: Delivery route
routes.text: The order of daily deliveries, address, contact number and geolocation are shown. The delivery can be marked complete in one click.

finance.title: Finance and debt control
finance.text: Each customer's balance, payment history, debt aging breakdown, and the ability to export reports.

broadcast.title: Mass broadcast
broadcast.text: Deliver promotions and announcements to all shop owners at once. A preview mode before sending is available.

promotions.title: Promotions and discounts
promotions.text: Create promotions with set validity periods and conditions. The system automatically applies the new product price.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.text: Every change in the system is recorded — by whom and when it was made. No data is lost.

botHealth.title: Bot status monitoring
botHealth.text: The bot's connection status, response speed and any errors appear on a single screen. Automatic alerts are sent.

roles.title: Employees and roles
roles.text: The owner, warehouse employee and courier roles are separated. Each employee sees only their own section.

security.title: Security
security.text: Two-factor authentication, session management, audit logging and price snapshots at the time of order — accounting always stays transparent.

pageWelcome.advantagesSubtitle: How OpenSales grows your organization's sales turnover.

alwaysOn.title: Round-the-clock order intake
alwaysOn.text: The shop owner can place orders even at night. In the morning the organization receives a ready-made list.

salesGrowth.title: Higher sales volume
salesGrowth.text: Push messages, the ability to reorder, and promotions significantly increase sales volume.

fast.title: Fast process
fast.text: The need to arrange orders over the phone is eliminated. The time from order to delivery shrinks from hours to minutes.

reports.title: Accurate reports
reports.text: Revenue, debt, top-selling products and courier performance are presented based on real numbers.

brand.title: Brand preserved
brand.text: Each distributor gets its own bot name, logo and description. The customer sees your organization's brand.

launch.title: Fast rollout
launch.text: Just enter the Telegram bot token — the catalog starts working within a few minutes.

pageWelcome.reportsHeading: Reports — the mirror of your business
pageWelcome.reportsLead: In OpenSales, every transaction, price change and payment is recorded. Any breakdown you need is provided in a few clicks.

reports.income: Revenue, net profit and commission in daily, monthly and yearly breakdowns.
reports.rating: A ranking of the most effective customers and the top-selling products.
reports.aging: Debt aging report (0–30, 30–60 and over 60 days).
reports.delivery: Analysis of courier performance and delivery time.
reports.audit: Audit log — a record of every action in the system.
reports.botStats: Statistics on bot status and errors.
reports.export: Ability to export reports in Excel, CSV and PDF formats.

pageWelcome.flowHeading: How the system gets up and running
pageWelcome.flowSubtitle: In five simple steps the full system starts working.

step1.title: The distributor registers
step1.text: The main admin creates an account for the organization and attaches the Telegram bot token.

step2.title: The catalog is uploaded
step2.text: Products, prices and stock levels are added by import or entered manually.

step3.title: The shop owner connects via bot or app
step3.text: The shop owner registers through the Telegram bot link or by installing the mobile app — both channels open the same account.

step4.title: The order flow begins
step4.text: The shop owner selects products from the catalog, and the order lands directly in the organization's panel.

step5.title: Delivery and payment
step5.text: The warehouse employee assembles the products, the courier takes them to the customer, the payment is recorded and the balance is updated.

pageWelcome.pricingSubtitle: Every plan has the full feature set — only the way payment is calculated differs. Our specialists will recommend the most cost-effective option for you.

shop.name: Per customer
shop.tagline: Adapts to the size of your network
shop.description: You pay only for active customers connected to the system. As your customer network grows, the cost increases step by step.
shop.formulaCaption: a fixed monthly fee per active customer

order.name: Per order
order.description: You pay a fixed amount for each order placed through the system. No orders — no payment.
order.benefit1: The best-fit plan for seasonal sales
order.benefit2: Safe even during a trial period

team.name: Per team size
team.description: Payment is calculated based on the number of couriers. The leaner your team, the lower the service fee.

pricingHelper.title: Which plan is right for you?
pricingHelper.text: Once we know the size of your organization and your sales model, we'll pick the most cost-effective plan and offer exact figures. This is free and with no obligation.

pageWelcome.faqSubtitle: Short, clear answers to the most common questions about OpenSales.

q1.a: OpenSales is a sales platform built in Uzbekistan for distributors and shop owners. A separate Telegram bot for each distributor, a web panel and real-time reports are combined in one system.

q2.a: The distributor registers and attaches the Telegram bot token. The catalog is uploaded, shop owners connect to the bot, orders land directly in the organization's panel, the courier delivers the product and the payment is recorded.

q3.a: There are three plans: by number of customers, by number of orders or by number of couriers. All plans have the full feature set, only the way payment is calculated differs.

q4.q: How long does it take to launch the system?
q4.a: Just enter the Telegram bot token — within 5 minutes the catalog starts working and shop owners can place orders.

q5.q: Does each distributor need a separate bot?
q5.a: Yes. OpenSales works on a multi-bot architecture: each distributor gets a personal Telegram bot under its own brand. The logo, name and description keep the organization's distinct look.

q6.a: No. The shop owner places orders two ways: through the Telegram bot or through the mobile app (Android & iOS). Both channels run on one account, so even if Telegram is completely unavailable, sales keep going through the app.

q7.q: How are debt and payments controlled?
q7.a: Each customer's balance, payment history and debt aging breakdown (0-30, 30-60, 60+ days) are tracked automatically. Reports can be exported in Excel, CSV and PDF formats.

q8.a: Yes, OpenSales was built in Uzbekistan and adapted for the local distribution market: accounting in so'm, an Uzbek-language interface, local logistics and familiar business processes.

pageWelcome.contactDescription: Sign up in a few minutes and launch your own Telegram bot. No calls or waiting — you start using it right away.

contactQuick.text: We'll get in touch within 30 minutes of your request being sent.

contactDemo.text: Enter your bot token — the system sets everything up automatically.

contactLaunch.text: Once the account is created, you start working right away by entering the bot token.

compare.heading: Compare with the alternatives

oneC.title: OpenSales vs 1C

salesDoctor.title: OpenSales vs Sales Doctor

calculator.title: Price calculator

orders.leaveEmptyToUnassign: Leave empty — the assignment will be removed
orders.cancelReasonPlaceholder: E.g.: Goods are out of stock
orders.cancelReasonMin: The reason must be at least 3 characters

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Buy goods from distributors
marketplace.empty: No products found on the marketplace
marketplace.confirmSwitchSeller: The cart contains another seller's product. Clear it?

marketplaceSettings.title: Marketplace settings
marketplaceSettings.subtitle: Terms for other dealers trading with you on the marketplace
marketplaceSettings.orderTermsDesc: Rules for orders placed with you via the marketplace
marketplaceSettings.minOrderHint: Buyer dealer cannot order less than this amount. 0 — no limit.

ordersMap.navigatorPick: Pick Yandex or Google map from the "Navigator" button.
ordersMap.navigatorWarn: Warning: Yandex link ≤ 10 points, Google ≤ 25 points — the rest is cut.

finance.addPaymentDesc: Accept money from the customer or record additional debt
finance.supplierPaymentDesc: Pay the supplier or record additional debt
finance.creditHint: Dealer is sending a payment to the supplier — debt decreases

orderSettings.subtitle: General order and visibility settings for the bot and mobile app
orderSettings.publicDesc: Visible to everyone in the region and joins independently
orderSettings.minOrderNoLimit: No limit — orders of any amount are accepted
orderSettings.marketplaceMinOrderHint: Buyers on the marketplace must order at least {amount} {symbol}
orderSettings.marketplaceMinOrderNoLimit: No marketplace limit — any amount accepted
orderSettings.showOutOfStockDesc: Appears in the catalog even when stock is 0
orderSettings.notifyPriceChangeDesc: Sent when a product price is updated
orderSettings.notifyNewProduct: Notify when a new product is added
orderSettings.notifyNewProductDesc: Sent when a product is added to the catalog
orderSettings.profileDesc: Name and description (shown in the bot and mobile app)

app.noShops: You aren't linked to any shop. Request an invite link from the supplier.
app.pickerSubtitle: Which shop are you ordering on behalf of?

cart.title: Cart
cart.notePlaceholder: For example: deliver in the morning
cart.successSubtitle: Your order has been sent to the dealer. We'll get in touch soon.

orders.title: Orders
orders.emptyHint: Place your first order from the catalog

info.projectTagline: Your sales agent in your pocket
info.projectDescription: OpenSales is a modern sales platform for dealers and shop owners. A separate Telegram bot and Mini App for each dealer lets you manage the catalog, cart, orders and payments from a single place.

features.cartText: Prices per block and per unit, quick add to cart
features.financeText: Balance, debt and payments in one place
features.multibotText: One platform — each dealer's own brand
features.realtimeText: Instant alerts on a new order or status

onboarding.title: Initial setup
onboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to get the system running

bot_connected.title: Connect the Telegram bot
bot_connected.description: Enter the bot token — we'll show you how to get it

notifications_connected.title: Connect notifications
notifications_connected.description: Press /start in your bot to receive order messages

has_category.title: Add a category
has_category.description: Create a category to group your products

has_product.title: Add a product
has_product.description: Add your first product to the catalog

has_shop.title: Invite a shop
has_shop.description: Invite your clients to the bot

has_deliveryman.title: Add a courier
has_deliveryman.description: Add a courier to deliver orders

welcome.title: Welcome! 🎉
welcome.body: Let's walk you through the main menus. It'll take a minute.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.body: Your sales, orders and financial metrics are here.

orders.title: Orders
orders.body: You manage orders from shops in this section.

products.title: Products
products.body: Here you add and edit the products in your catalog.

categories.title: Categories
categories.body: Create categories to group your products.

finish.title: Done! 🚀
finish.body: The remaining sections are in the side menu. Finish setup using the checklist below.

trialBanner.activeText: After the trial, you'll be billed for the selected plan.
trialBanner.expiredText: To keep using the system, please make a payment. We'll get in touch with you soon.

locationPicker.clickOrDragHint: Click a spot on the map or drag the marker
locationPicker.linkPlaceholder: Paste a Google or Yandex map link
locationPicker.coordsNotFound: No coordinates found in the link
locationPicker.outsideUz: Warning: this location is outside Uzbekistan ({lat}, {lng})
locationPicker.geoPermissionDenied: Location access denied. Allow access in your browser settings.
locationPicker.geoPositionUnavailable: Could not determine location. Check that Wi-Fi or GPS is enabled and try again.
locationPicker.geoTimeout: Locating took too long. Please try again.
locationPicker.geoIpFallback: An approximate location was shown via IP{city} — drag the marker to the exact spot.

message.title: Message
message.textPlaceholder: Hello! We have a special offer for you today...
